source_notes.sfd: Schlegel, Finkbeiner & Davis 1998 full-sky E(B-V), Harvard Dataverse DOI 10.7910/DVN/EWCNL5.
source_notes.random_density: Local Quaia G<20.0 10x random catalog binned to the selection HEALPix grid.
source_notes.gaia_scanlaw: Nominal Gaia scanning-law FITS bundle from the gaiascanlaw package, counted to the DR3 end date.
